economic_notes: Musqueam has significant real estate development activities through GBEs including Block F Limited Partnership, MST partnerships (Jericho, Fairmont, West Vancouver), Willingdon Developments, LDB Developments, Shalimar Place, Musqueam Marina, and Salish Seas Fisheries. GBE total assets $589M, investment properties $505M, long-term debt $270M. During year purchased remaining 50% interest in Milltown Marine & Boatyard Joint Venture for $10,365,266.
notes: This is a refiled financial statement for year ended March 31, 2022 - the original was missing the Basis for Opinion section in the auditor's report. Complex consolidation structure with 34+ fully consolidated subsidiaries and 38+ GBEs accounted for under modified equity method. GBEs have total assets of $589M and long-term debt of $270M not reflected on Band's balance sheet. Tangible capital asset note was truncated in source document so net book value could not be confirmed. Net financial assets of $200M reflects large investment balances. Ottawa Trust Funds of $5.33M held as cash. 2010 Legacies Trust distributed $415,128 during year.
